mapper.select: SELECT ANY_VALUE(a.id) AS id, a.name, ANY_VALUE(a.avatarUrl) AS avatarUrl, ANY_VALUE(a.avatarNetworkUrl) AS avatarNetworkUrl FROM user_playback_history h INNER JOIN artists a ON a.id = h.artist_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY a.name ORDER BY MAX(h.played_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id, s.title, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.name ORDER BY sa.is_main DESC, a.name ASC SEPARATOR ', ') AS artistName, ANY_VALUE(s.coverUrl) AS coverUrl, ANY_VALUE(s.coverNetworkUrl) AS coverNetworkUrl, s.duration, ANY_VALUE(s.external_source) AS externalSource, ANY_VALUE(s.external_id) AS externalId, ANY_VALUE(s.pic_id) AS picId, MAX(h.played_at) AS playedAt FROM user_playback_history h INNER JOIN songs s ON s.id = h.song_id LEFT JOIN song_artist sa ON s.id = sa.song_id LEFT JOIN artists a ON sa.artist_id = a.id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT (s.external_source IS NOT NULL AND s.external_source != '' AND (s.coverNetworkUrl IS NULL OR s.coverNetworkUrl = '')) GROUP BY s.id, s.title, s.duration ORDER BY MAX(h.played_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_artist_follows WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_playback_history (user_id, song_id, artist_id, played_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, #{artistId}, #{playedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, song_id AS songId, artist_id AS artistId, played_at AS playedAt FROM user_playback_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY played_at DESC LIMIT 100
